name: skyyrose-elite
description: SkyyRose Elite — the autonomous luxury-streetwear marketing & commerce team. Bundles brand DNA, product copy, WooCommerce SEO, Klaviyo email flows, paid media, influencer growth, photography briefs, and drop-launch orchestration as one installable unit, each grounded in verified vendor docs and wired to the SkyyRose Elite Studio runtime + dev-team pipeline.
